note: Accepted PRODUCTION (non-test/fixture) sharded≡exact RESOLVED-edge divergences on this repo (post-Prettier-baseline tree). functionsOnly{Exact,Sharded} MUST be 0 (hard failure). EXCEEDING this fails graph-equivalence-check (a resolver regression); a decrease passes with a tighten hint (ratchet). AFTER PHASE 3 (one resolution model, Option A): 204 -> 12. The two engines now run ONE model — the single-program (exact) build recovers cross-package edges via the SAME syntactic boundary linker (resolveCrossBoundaryCalls) the sharded build runs post-merge (exact = the 1-shard case; cache-orchestrator.recoverExactBoundaryEdges). Journey: Phase 0.1 removed 33 bare-name phantoms (204->171); Phase 1 collapsed sharded JSX double-emissions (171->128/budget reflecting reformatted tree); Phase 2 made buildExportIndex follow re-export chains in BOTH engines (-56); Phase 3 converged exact onto the boundary path (-) + file+name pin (unique-or-decline, identical in both engines) + declined param-callback/property-signature name-guesses (a concrete-callable decl is now required for the name fallback) -> 12. RESIDUAL (the 12, all tracked): ~11 'both-resolve-differently' cross-package SAME-NAME mis-narrowings on registry methods (find/getAll/register across CheckRegistry/RuleRegistry/AdapterRegistry/RecipeRegistry) where the two engines pick different same-name occurrences -- a genuine disambiguation gap, real bug, tracked for follow-up; + 1 sharded-only (dashboard-data getAll). KNOWN OUT-OF-SCOPE CLASS (not a divergence, both engines decline -> invisible to this differential gate, guarded by the Phase-4 resolution-rate floor): arrow-property method calls like logger.info() where findCatalogEntry cannot reproduce the arrow occurrence's hash -- N sites, both decline, tracked for follow-up. DEFERRED (explicit, NOT silently dropped): clean-checkout parity for WORKSPACE imports -- exact still resolves @scope/pkg through the dep's built dist/*.d.ts to REACH the boundary linker, so `rm -rf packages/*/dist` still drops those edges in exact (sharded's syntactic boundary extractor is dist-independent; the file+name pin made RELATIVE imports clean-safe in both). The source-as-surface program change (resolve @scope/pkg to dep src) is deferred to a follow-up; Phase 6's clean-checkout assertion is scoped to the relative class accordingly.
